conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'm designing the auth system for my app. I need to decide between building it myself or using a third-party service like Auth0 or Clerk.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Building it myself gives full control but auth is notoriously hard to get right.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Auth0 is enterprise-grade but feels overkill for our startup stage.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Clerk has great DX and is priced reasonably for our scale.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We're going with Clerk. Security isn't something I want to cut corners on, and Clerk gets us there fast.

query: What did the user decide to use for authentication in their app?
